title: acioa dewevrei var. vanhouttei
intro: Acioa dewevrei var. vanhouttei, also known as Van Houtte's acioa, is a plant species that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Acioa dewevrei var. vanhouttei include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in the production of herbal teas and supplements.
